name: sdt-framework-ia
description: SDT QA Automation Framework with Playwright + AI

scripts.test:report: npm run allure:clean && npm run test:web && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:report:visual: npm run allure:clean && npm run test:visual && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:report:api: npm run allure:clean && npm run test:api && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
